ascend_skill.desc:
At the start of battle, grant Mastermind to the ally with the highest Attack (prioritizing Sweepers or Assassins, select Akechi if no target found). At the start of each turn, can manually reselect a target to grant Mastermind. Only 1 ally can have Mastermind at one time (reselecting has a cooldown of 1 turn).
Also, increase Akechi's Attack by 25% of the Mastermind ally's Attack (up to a maximum of 500/750/1000, at level 1/50/70, respectively).
When an ally besides Akechi has Mastermind and deals damage to all foes with an attack skill, Highlight, Theurgy, or Resonance, record the average damage dealt to all foes (if targeting 1 foe, record 40% of the damage dealt). At the start of Akechi's turn, gain 1 Arrow of Truth stack based on the amount of damage recorded, and reset the recorded damage. Arrow of Truth can be held for 2 turns.
When Akechi has Mastermind, the effect of Rain of Justice changes, and Arrow of Truth deals Almighty damage based on the skill multiplier or Arrow of Perjury.
ascend_skill.name: High School Detective

ascend_skill.desc:
At the start of battle, gain Deduction, and the durations of Deduction and Stratagem are extended to 4 turns.
Also, when Deduction and Stratagem are both active, increase Akechi's critical rate by 16%, and increase the damage dealt by Akechi and allies with Mastermind by 25%.
ascend_skill.name: Detective Profile

ascend_skill.desc: When dealing damage with a skill, if the attribute of the last skill used was different, increase the Attack of Akechi and allies with Mastermind by 25%, and their critical damage by 30%. Lasts for 1 turn.
ascend_skill.name: Detective Advice

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Rain of Justice and Thief Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Detective Style

ascend_skill.desc: Highlight Enhanced: Increase the damage of Arrow of Perjury by 30% more for 4 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Detective Trick

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Flash of Intuition and Decisive Scheme by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Detective Logic

ascend_skill.desc:
When using Rain of Justice, increase the effect of Arrow of Truth by 50%.
Akechi and all allies are considered to have the Mastermind effect (the Attack increase from High School Detective is based on the ally with the highest Attack). During battle, increase Akechi's critical rate and critical damage more. This additional increase is equal to 40% of the critical rate of the Mastermind ally with the highest critical rate, and 40% of the highest critical multiplier exceeding 100% (up to a maximum of 20% and 40%, respectively).
ascend_skill.name: Masked Detective

highlight_skill.desc:
Deal Bless damage to all foes equal to 124.1%/136.9%/131.8%/144.5% of Attack, and Curse damage equal to 124.1%/136.9%/131.8%/144.5% of Attack (1 hit each).
Also, for 4 turns, increase Arrow of Perjury's number of hits by 2.
highlight_skill.name: Highlight

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Bless damage to all foes equal to 93.2%/102.8%/98.9%/108.5% of Attack. Also, restore all allies' HP by 1561/1561/1657/1657 and grant 1 Blessing stack.
Also, gain Suspicion, and gain Deduction for 2 turns. With Deduction, increase party's damage by 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7%.
normal_skill.name: Flash of Intuition

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Curse damage to all foes equal to 116.5%/128.5%/123.7%/135.6% of Attack.
Also, gain Suspicion, and gain Stratagem for 2 turns. With Stratagem, decrease all foes' Defense by 25.4%/28.0%/26.9%/29.5%. Also increase Arrow of Perjury's number of hits by 1, and increase damage dealt by 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7%.
normal_skill.name: Decisive Scheme

normal_skill.desc:
Usable with Suspicion.
Spend all Arrow of Truth stacks, deal a fixed amount of Almighty damage to all foes equal to 19.5%/21.5%/20.7%/22.7% of the damage recorded by each Arrow of Truth stack, and lose Suspicion.
Then, activate Arrow of Perjury on random foes, dealing Almighty damage equal to 77.4%/85.3%/82.2%/90.1% (4 hits). From the second hit, prioritize new targets, and decrease damage to 15% for hits on the same target.
If Akechi has Mastermind, Arrow of Truth gains 240% of the Almighty damage of Arrow of Perjury.
normal_skill.name: Rain of Justice

passive_skill.desc: Can activate Flames of Desire effects with all allies in the party. At the start of battle, for each Flames of Desire effect activated, increase Akechi's damage by 15.0%.
passive_skill.name: Rival's Pride

passive_skill.desc: When dealing Almighty damage, for every 1% of the target's decreased Defense, increase Akechi's damage dealt by 0.5% (up to a maximum of 120.0%).
passive_skill.name: Rending Arrow
